title: " Non-identity-check" is QMA-complete
authors: D Janzing, P Wocjan, T Beth
abstract: We describe a computational problem that is complete for the complexity class QMA, a quantum generalization of NP. It arises as a natural question in quantum computing and quantum physics." Non-identity-check" is the following decision problem: Given a classical description of a quantum circuit (a sequence of elementary gates), determine whether it is almost equivalent to the identity. Explicitly, the task is to decide whether the corresponding unitary is close to a complex multiple of the identity matrix with respect to the operator norm …
